name: ExtensionNutritionOrder_EnteralFormula_Administration_Schedule_AsNeeded
title: R5: Take 'as needed' (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `NutritionOrder.enteralFormula.administration.schedule.asNeeded` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`NutritionOrder.enteralFormula.administration.schedule.asNeeded` 0..1 `boolean`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `NutritionOrder.enteralFormula.administration.schedule.asNeeded` 0..1 `boolean`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `NutritionOrder.enteralFormula.administration.schedule.asNeeded` has a context of NutritionOrder.enteralFormula.administration.schedule based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `NutritionOrder`.
Element `NutritionOrder.enteralFormula.administration.schedule.asNeeded` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:
Element `NutritionOrder.enteralFormula.administration.schedule.asNeeded` has a context of NutritionOrder.enteralFormula.administration.schedule based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `NutritionOrder`.
Element `NutritionOrder.enteralFormula.administration.schedule.asNeeded` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.definition: Indicates whether the enteral formula is only taken when needed within a specific dosing schedule.
